vision_profile.current_state: Sam is a beginner with no prior programming experience, eager to start a career in AI and machine learning.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The biggest blocker is the lack of foundational knowledge in programming and core AI/ML concepts.
vision_profile.top_motivation: Sam is highly motivated to become an AI/ML expert, driven by the exciting possibilities in the field.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You can write basic Python programs, understand essential math for AI, and perform fundamental data handling.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the bedrock for your AI journey, building a strong foundation in programming and data essentials.

modules.title: Python for AI
lessons: Basic Data Structures: Lists, Tuples, Dictionaries

science.desc: You encounter a Python script with syntax errors and logical bugs. Your task is to identify and fix them to make the program run correctly and produce the expected output.

modules.title: Algorithms & Data Handling
lessons: Data Handling with Pandas: Series & DataFrames

science.desc: You are given a raw dataset with inconsistencies, missing values, and incorrect formats. Your task is to apply appropriate data cleaning and preprocessing techniques to make it ready for analysis.

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You can implement and evaluate core supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms.
milestones.identity_statement: You are transitioning from foundational knowledge to practical application, building your first machine learning models.

science.desc: You are tasked with building a classification model for a medical diagnosis task. You need to choose the right algorithm, evaluate its performance using appropriate metrics, and explain your choice.

milestones.label: M03
milestones.o: You can design, train, and evaluate basic neural networks for various tasks.
milestones.identity_statement: You are diving into the powerful world of deep learning, understanding how neural networks learn complex patterns.

modules.title: Neural Networks & Computer Vision
lessons: Introduction to Object Detection (R-CNN, YOLO basics)

science.desc: Explain the core concepts of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and how they differ from traditional neural networks. Provide an example of a real-world problem where CNNs excel.

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You can apply machine learning techniques to natural language processing and computer vision problems.
milestones.identity_statement: You are expanding your expertise into specialized AI fields, tackling real-world problems in language and vision.

science.desc: You are building a chatbot that needs to understand user queries and generate relevant responses. Design a basic NLP pipeline for processing user input, including tokenization, embedding, and sentiment analysis.

video.title: SIFT, SURF, ORB for Keypoint Detection

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You can understand, apply, and fine-tune generative models, including Transformers and Diffusion models.
milestones.identity_statement: You are mastering the cutting edge of AI, creating and manipulating complex data with generative models.

modules.title: Transformers & Attention
lessons: BERT: Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers

science.desc: You are tasked with generating high-resolution images of specific objects from text descriptions. Choose between GANs and Diffusion models, justify your choice, and outline the steps to implement it.

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You can deploy, monitor, and maintain machine learning models in production environments.
milestones.identity_statement: You are bridging the gap between development and production, ensuring AI solutions are robust and scalable.

modules.title: Model Serving & APIs
lessons: Designing REST APIs for ML Models
Introduction to FastAPI for ML Serving

science.desc: Describe the process of deploying a machine learning model into a production environment. What are the key considerations for scalability, reliability, and maintainability?

modules.title: Cloud & Deployment
lessons: Introduction to Cloud Platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Security Best Practices for ML Deployment

science.desc: Your company needs to deploy a new ML model to production with high availability and scalability. You need to choose a cloud deployment strategy (e.g., serverless functions vs. managed services) and justify your decision based on cost, performance, and maintenance.

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You can design scalable AI systems, understand ethical implications, and lead complex AI projects.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming a visionary in AI, shaping the future of intelligent systems with ethical and architectural foresight.

modules.title: AI-Powered Systems
lessons: Foundations of System Design for AI
Data Pipelines & Feature Engineering at Scale
Designing for High Availability & Fault Tolerance

modules.title: GenAI & Responsible AI
lessons: Bias Detection & Mitigation in AI Models
Responsible Deployment & Governance of AI Systems

scenario.title: Address Bias in a Loan Application Model

science.desc: Discuss the ethical implications of deploying a large language model (LLM) for public use. How would you address potential issues like bias, misinformation, and misuse?
